title: Consumer Lending Risk Factors
text: Credit risk in unsecured consumer lending is strongly influenced by borrower income stability, prior delinquency history, debt burden, utilization, and broader economic stress.

title: Bond Duration Basics
text: Duration is a measure of interest-rate sensitivity. Bonds with longer duration tend to have larger price moves when yields change.

title: Retail Credit Scorecard Design
text: Typical scorecards consider repayment history, leverage, affordability metrics, recent inquiries, and behavioral signals.

title: Fixed Income Risk Overview
text: When rates rise, longer-duration bond prices usually fall more than shorter-duration bond prices.

title: Liquidity Regulation Primer
text: The liquidity coverage ratio requires banks to hold high-quality liquid assets sufficient to meet stressed net cash outflows over a short horizon.

title: Macroeconomic Stress and Credit Losses
text: Unemployment shocks and falling income can reduce borrowers' repayment capacity and raise expected credit losses.

title: High-Quality Liquid Assets
text: High-quality liquid assets support resilience during periods of funding stress and market disruption.

title: Information Retrieval Metrics
text: Precision measures the fraction of retrieved results that are relevant. Recall measures the fraction of all relevant results that were retrieved.

title: Ranking Quality Measures
text: MRR and nDCG are commonly used to evaluate result ranking quality in information retrieval systems.

title: Money Market Fund Overview
text: Money market funds generally prioritize liquidity and capital preservation through short-duration instruments.

title: Short-Duration Bond Fund Overview
text: Short-duration bond funds may offer higher yield potential than cash-like products but can lose value when rates rise or spreads widen.

title: Cash Management Product Comparison
text: Product selection often depends on liquidity needs, principal stability, yield expectations, and risk tolerance.

title: Emergency Fund Planning
text: A common guideline is to hold three to six months of essential expenses in a liquid account and fund it gradually.

title: Budgeting and Savings Setup
text: Automated transfers and a simple spending plan can help households build reserves consistently.

title: Chunking Policy Documents
text: Chunk size should balance local coherence with retrieval granularity. Policy documents often benefit from section-aware chunking and header retention.

title: Semantic Segmentation for RAG
text: Semantic or recursive chunking can reduce context fragmentation when documents include structured sections and long paragraphs.

title: Long Document Retrieval Trade-offs
text: Large chunks may improve context completeness but reduce precision and increase wasted tokens.

title: Why Rerankers Help
text: Rerankers can improve top-k relevance by refining initial retrieval results with a more precise relevance model.

title: Dense Retrieval Failure Modes
text: Dense retrieval may return semantically related but task-irrelevant results; reranking helps reorder candidates closer to the query intent.
